common.siteDescription: DotaData is a competitive Dota 2 analytics hub highlighting league trends, team performance, and patch shifts.

footer.description: Competitive Dota 2 data platform focused on leagues, teams, and patch insights. Built for analysts, fans, and esports operators.

home.title: Competitive Dota 2 Analytics, Trends, and Match Intelligence

teams.title: Professional Dota 2 Teams — Statistics, Match History & Analysis
teams.metaDescription: Browse professional Dota 2 teams with match history and performance analysis. Find detailed team data and competitive insights.
teams.heroLead: Explore professional Dota 2 teams, their match history, and performance stats.
teams.shareText: 👥 {teams} pro Dota 2 teams with {matches} matches of history — browse the full index on DotaData

team.shareText: 👥 {team}: {matches} matches, full history and analytics on DotaData
team.noMatches: This team has no matches recorded yet.

header.heading: {team} Handicap Analysis
header.lead: Analyzing {matches} matches with kill handicaps from -16.5 to +16.5.

howItWorks.heading: How it works:
howItWorks.body: For each match, we simulate how the result would change if we applied kill handicaps ranging from -16.5 to +16.5. A positive handicap helps the losing team, while a negative handicap reduces the winning team's advantage.

teamHandicap.shareText: 📊 {team} kill-score handicap analysis across {matches} matches on DotaData

patches.title: Dota 2 Patches — Handicap Analysis by Patch
patches.metaDescription: Browse Dota 2 patches and analyze team handicap statistics for each patch version.
patches.heroLead: Select a patch to analyze team handicap statistics and performance data.
patches.shareText: 🔧 {patches} Dota 2 patches and {matches} matches — handicap analysis on DotaData

table.title: Available patches
table.lead: Click on a patch to analyze team handicap statistics.

guide.title: How to use Patch Handicap Analysis
guide.step1Body: Choose a patch version to analyze team performance data from that meta.
guide.step2Body: Select one team for individual analysis or two teams for comparison.
guide.step3Body: View detailed handicap statistics for victories, losses, and patterns.

patches.noData: No patch data is available in the database.

patchHandicap.shareText: 📊 Patch {patch} kill-score handicap analysis on DotaData — pick your teams and dig in

international.title: The International — Dota 2 World Championship
international.metaDescription: Every edition of The International on DotaData — match counts, hero trends, standout performances, and historical context for Dota 2's flagship tournament.
international.heroLead: The International is Dota 2's flagship world championship. This page brings every edition together, combining match outcomes, hero trends, and standout performances into one unified history of the event.

about.title: About this page:
about.body: Explore all International editions, compare winrates and match lengths across years, and see the heroes and players that defined the biggest stage in Dota 2.

international.shareText: 🏆 The International on DotaData: {editions} editions, {matches} matches — explore the full history
international.editionsLead: Match volume, average duration, and Radiant winrate per TI.
